title: Ghostpile
summary: A dodge-run chain letter. Hold to fly, release to fall, thread the cave — and every player who beats the link is frozen inside it as a solid wall, so each share makes the level harder. The whole pile of ghosts is encoded in the URL — no backend.

title: Sorta
summary: A daily deduction game. A machine has one secret rule about shapes — probe it, crack the rule, then ace the 5-shape exam everyone on Earth takes today. Wordle-style spoiler-free emoji-grid share.

title: Tabfish
summary: The fishing game you play by not playing it. Cast your lure, switch tabs and work — it sinks in real time toward rarer, deeper fish, even while the tab is closed. Your tab title flips to FISH ON when one bites.

title: Askew
summary: Tap the exact center of 20 shapes in 45 seconds. Askew separates your precision from your bias and reveals which way your brain secretly leans — a shareable identity number and scatter plot.

title: Wordle Clone
summary: A fully playable Wordle clone with daily words and statistics.

title: Fake Casino
summary: A play-money casino sandbox — spin, bet and cash out with zero real stakes. Purely a UI/animation playground; no money, no accounts.
